title: Amtech G4445 100mm (4") Roller Sleeves, 9mm Microfibre Pile Roller Sleeves, Short Pile Paint Rollers for Smooth Paint Surfaces, 2 Pack
features: SMOOTH FINISH: These 100mm (4") roller sleeves have an extra short, 4mm microfibre pile for excellent paint pickup and a smooth, gloss finish
LONG-LASTING: The thermal bonded sleeve ensures minimal hair fibre loss and the strong plastic core ensures a long life and prevents fabric unwinding when soaked
VERSATILE: They are suitable for use with emulsion paints and varnish
COMPACT DESIGN: Suitable for confined or hard-to-reach spaces
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech has a comprehensive range of essential DIY tools for all your decorating and household needs. Our range of good quality paint rollers and sleeves are available in two different sizes, including 4” (100mm) and 9” (225mm). A compatible extension pole, to reach those high walls and ceilings is also available along with a range of paint brushes and trays. Amtech’s great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3-year product guarantee. So, keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No
